resident.payDirect: you're paying the building directly — the money never passes through Tasker
resident.noAccountYet: The committee hasn't set up the building account yet. Once you pay by transfer, mark it with the button below and the committee will confirm it.
resident.nothingDue: Nothing's due. Once the committee issues the next charge, you'll get a notification and the QR code will be here.

committee.title: Payments · {{period}}
committee.subtitle: The money goes straight to the building's account. You just issue the charge and confirm what came in.
committee.emptyNoCharges: No charges have been issued for this period yet. Issue them with the button above.
committee.nothingToSend: no one owes anything, nothing to send

detail.title: Charge detail
detail.noQr: Can't generate a QR code without the building's account.
detail.paidNote: Paid, nothing else to do here.
detail.clickHint: Click a row in the table. You'll see the QR code for the building account, the variable symbol, and actions for that unit.

missingAccount.title: Building account missing
missingAccount.body: Can't generate a QR code without an account number. Add it in Building Settings and neighbors can pay by scanning.

committee.bankSync: Bank matching: connect Fio under Building Management → Settings and incoming payments confirm themselves by VS and amount. ČS and KB are coming soon.

toastMarkedPaid: Marked as paid, awaiting committee confirmation
toastReminderNoApp: Unit {{unit}} isn't on the app yet — a letter will be printed
